narrative: Fed on hold at 3.75%. The risk premium and a +275bp OIS carry advantage keep USD/JPY bid at 162.46, while options price a notable premium with USD/JPY IV at 7.2% vs HV30 3.3%. Broad risk-off sentiment remains contained as equities consolidate -0.28%, DXY holds -0.02%, and VIX prints 16.9. Watch the Bank of Canada rate decision on July 15 as the next key policy catalyst.
